name: Bookmark Vault
description: Universal bookmark gear for saving arbitrary text or URLs, enriching links with media, Twitter/X, and web metadata when available.

capabilities.title: Save bookmark
capabilities.description: Save arbitrary user-provided content. If the content contains a URL, enrich it with media metadata, Twitter/X embed metadata, or basic web metadata before writing it to the gear file database. Optional local media paths can be attached to the bookmark.
examples: Save this link as a bookmark
Save this media link with imported local files
